name: agora-agents-hackathon
description: Arc Agent SDK starter workspace for the Agora agent hackathon

scripts.test:ui: npm run build:arc-swap && npm --prefix packages/ui run test
scripts.typecheck:ui: npm run build:arc-swap && npm --prefix packages/ui run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:root && npm run typecheck:ui
scripts.test: npm run test:arc-swap && npm run test:ui
scripts.build:ui: npm run build:arc-swap && npm --prefix packages/ui run build
scripts.py:defi-agent:lint: cd packages/defi-agent && uv run ruff check src tests examples
scripts.py:defi-agent:test: cd packages/defi-agent && uv run pytest tests
scripts.py:defi-agent:run:rsi:mock: cd packages/defi-agent && uv run python examples/rsi_swap/run.py --once --mock
scripts.py:defi-agent:run:lp: cd packages/defi-agent && uv run python examples/lp_manager/run.py --once
scripts.py:defi-agent:run:yield: cd packages/defi-agent && uv run python examples/yield_farmer/run.py --once
